why_v1: Call controls risk when stack depth does not support a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because the depth still lets you realize equity out of position without forcing a pot your hand cannot own.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better here because even out of position you still have enough depth to realize equity without forcing a pot that your hand cannot dominate. A controlled continue keeps the range intact while the edge is not clean enough to justify immediate aggression.
